ACP03E - AirCard Pro Dual:
The First Dual-Network Wallet Tracker Card — Works with Both iPhone & Android

AirCard Pro Dual is the world's first card-sized Bluetooth tracker that works simultaneously with Apple Find My and Google Find Hub — no need to choose a version or reset when switching phones. At just 2.2mm thin (thinner than two credit cards stacked), it slides into any wallet, purse, or cardholder and stays connected to both the billion-strong Apple network and Android's growing Find Hub ecosystem.

Unlike competitors that require you to pick Apple OR Android, AirCard Pro Dual connects to both networks in a single device. Perfect for mixed Apple/Android households, business travelers with multiple devices, or anyone who might switch phones in the future.

Featured in: 9to5Mac, Android Police, Android Guys, Brad's Backpack
ANP03E - AirNotch Pro Dual:
The First Dual-Network Keyring Tracker — Works with Both iPhone & Android

AirNotch Pro Dual is the world's first keyring-sized Bluetooth tracker with replaceable batteries that works simultaneously with Apple Find My and Google Find Hub. With 20 months of battery life from two standard CR2032 cells, 360° omnidirectional sound from dual buzzers, and an IP68 waterproof rugged build, it's the most feature-complete keyring tracker on the market.

While AirTag only works with iPhone and Samsung SmartTag only works with Galaxy, AirNotch Pro Dual connects to both networks in one device. No reset needed, no version to choose.

ACP03E - AirCard Pro Dual:
Frequently Asked Questions

Does AirCard Pro Dual really work with both iPhone and Android at the same time?

Yes. Unlike most competitors that require a reset to switch between Apple Find My and Google Find Hub, AirCard Pro Dual connects to both networks simultaneously from a single device. You never need to choose a version.

How thin is it compared to other wallet trackers?

At 2.2mm, AirCard Pro Dual is thinner than two credit cards stacked together. For comparison: KeySmart SmartCard is 1.8mm, Pebblebee Card Universal is 2.8mm, and Apple AirTag is 8mm (too thick for most wallets).

How do I charge it?

Place it on any Qi-compatible wireless charger (the same charger you use for your iPhone or Samsung phone). It fully recharges in about 90 minutes and lasts up to 12 months.

What happens if someone finds my lost wallet?

AirCard Pro Dual has QR Lost Mode — the finder simply scans the QR code on the card with their phone camera (no app needed). They'll see your custom contact message with whatever info you choose to share through Sherr.it.

Is it louder than AirTag?

Yes. AirCard Pro Dual's 20mm buzzer is 20% louder than Apple AirTag, making it easier to locate your wallet between couch cushions or in a bag.

Can I use it to track things other than my wallet?

Yes. Pair it with the AirCard Pouch ($14.90) to attach it to laptops, luggage, backpacks, or scooters. The AirCard Notebook ($9.90) has a built-in slot for a trackable journal.
ANP03E - AirNotch Pro Dual:
Frequently Asked Questions

Does AirNotch Pro Dual really work with both iPhone and Android at the same time?

Yes. AirNotch Pro Dual connects to both Apple Find My and Google Find Hub simultaneously. No need to reset or choose a version — it works with any phone.

How long does the battery last and how do I replace it?

The two CR2032 batteries last up to 20 months — 67% longer than AirTag (12 months). To replace, unscrew the Torx screws, swap the standard CR2032 cells available at any store, and reseal.

Is it really waterproof?

Yes. IP68 rated — the highest consumer waterproof rating. It withstands full submersion, dust, mud, and rain. For comparison: AirTag is IP67, Chipolo Pop is IPX5.

How loud is it compared to AirTag?

Significantly louder. AirNotch Pro Dual has two buzzers (20mm + 15mm) placed on opposite sides for 360° sound coverage. You can hear it from another room.

What does glow-in-the-dark mean?

Photoluminescent parts (inspired by Swiss luxury watches) absorb light and glow in the dark. Find your keys at night without needing to use your phone first.

Does it need a separate keyring accessory?

No. AirNotch Pro Dual has a built-in solid aluminum keyring hook. Unlike AirTag ($29 + $35 keyring accessory), it attaches directly to your keys out of the box.
